text:
The QAT Life Pendant Innovative Design for Body Rejuvenation The QAT Life Pendant, featuring its original infusion, is a distinctive device 
crafted specifically for body rejuvenation, Heart-Mind enhancement, and 
EMF protection. Its uniqueness lies in its ability to source information 
from the quantum field. This infusion targets mitochondria, which serve 
as the energy factories within our cells. Additionally, the pendant was 
designed to address the effects of aging on the master glands, 
specifically the Pineal and Pituitary glands, which regulate other glands 
and organs throughout the body. To further enhance wellness, the 
pendant includes additional programs that support essential bodily 
functions, making it a holistic solution for overall health. Heart-Mind Transmission and Emotional Balance A notable feature of the QAT Life Pendant is its role as a powerful 
transmitter of Heart-Mind energy. Its design aims to assist wearers in 
maintaining both emotional and mental equilibrium, helping to 
counteract everyday stress that can contribute to accelerated aging. This 
function offers a deep sense of reassurance and peace, beneficial for 
those seeking to remain centered during religious prayer or meditation 
practices. EMF Protection and Effectiveness One of the pendant’s key attributes is its ability to convert the negative 
impact of electromagnetic frequencies (EMF) into positive effects. As 
demonstrated in QAT classes, exposure to cell phones can influence the 
nervous system, affecting individuals to varying degrees. Unlike many 
other products or phone cases tested, which often fall short of their 
claims, the QAT Life Pendant is engineered to address these concerns 
effectively.

Durability and Convenience Constructed from robust stainless steel, the QAT Life Pendant is built for 
lasting comfort and ease of use. It can be cleaned simply with regular 
soap and water and retains its infusion permanently, unless the metal is 
melted. The pendant is unaffected by airport scanners or routers and has 
shown no signs of losing efficacy or ceasing to function. Usage and Wearing Instructions The pendant may be worn around the neck, which is recommended, or 
kept in a pocket. Some individuals may need to wear it for brief periods 
initially to minimize any discomfort associated with the rejuvenation 
process. Experiences with sleep vary: some users report deep and restful 
sleep when wearing the pendant at night, while others may need to 
remove it during sleep as it keeps them alert. Ordering Information The Life pendant is available for 60€. To place an order, email 
qatbylw@gmail.com and include your mailing address. A payment link 
will be sent through Wise. Discounts are available for orders of ten or 
more pendants. ETC This non-electronic device needs no batteries or wires. The pendant features a hole for attaching to a chain or rope. You can use it for people of any age, as well as your pets. You can wear it with other QAT pendants. The Connect to the Brain (CTB) 
pendant enhances coordination by restoring neuro-muscular 
connections to your muscles and joints. The Acupuncture pendant 
maintains meridian flow, helping overall organ health, immunity, and 
muscle function.
